title: wissadula stipulata
intro: Wissadula stipulata, also known as the prickly poppy or woolly poppy, is a shrub-like plant that belongs to the Malvaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. It is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and relieving respiratory problems. Wissadula stipulata can be prepared for medicinal use through herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used in topical applications and ointments.
